feedback.text: Hello, this website is very good and easy to navigate, please send my compliments to all involved. Video games are as an important a part of culture and society as philosophy, literature, art and films are. And those who purchase any one of these pieces of culture should be entitled to have them protected without losing ownership of their property in any way. The owners of video games should have their games protected from publishers attempting to destroy and/or disable video games. One video game which is of particular cultural significance in my opinion is Battlefield 1 (2016) Battlefield 1 is a first-person shooter set during the first world war (1914-1918) in multiple different ways, this video game not only brings the first world war to life in a truly incredible way, but also sheds light on the horrors of war and the human element of conflicts which is so often ignored in society and culture even after two world wars and during contemporary conflicts. However, Battlefield 1 is only one game at risk of destruction, there are many others that are are equally worth reserving. Thank you for reading my essay. Sincerly, Seamas Fagan Shodeke, Country galway, Ireland.
